Notice Of Motion For Relief Of Court Ordered Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Kamchi Leung's Motion for Relief of Court Ordered Sanctions issued on 12/15/2009 to Dennis M. Carr, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings not reported. (212)
